dense_en: A man with medium skin tone, dark straight hair cut medium length, and full bangs covering the forehead, with a rounded face and a soft jawline. He has a medium height, slim narrow frame with slightly narrow gently sloped shoulders, a moderately long flat torso, relatively long legs, and straight lean limbs. His posture carries a slight forward head and upper torso inclination with the shoulders a bit rounded forward, and his arms hang low with limited swing as he walks. He wears predominantly dark clothing: a dark hooded zip outerwear layer over a gray hooded sweatshirt, with the light gray inner hood lying flat on the upper back and around the neck, long sleeves to the wrists, dark straight leg pants, and bright white sneakers with thick light soles. He also carries a black backpack with two shoulder straps.

A woman with a short, stocky build and a broad midsection, light skin, and a rounded face with a soft jawline. She has short dark brown hair with slight volume on top, tucked behind the ear, with a receding hairline at the temples and sideburns. She wears a dark lapel blazer open at the front with a plain finish, paired with dark straight leg full length trousers and dark shoes, creating a mostly dark outfit.

A tall slim man with very light skin, a closely shaved head with light hair at the sides, eyeglasses, and a narrow oval face with a narrow jawline. He has slightly narrow shoulders and wears a black V neck knit sweater with light trim at the neckline over a white collared shirt with the collar outside the sweater, a dark necktie, and dark straight leg trousers. He carries a black backpack on one shoulder along with a closed black umbrella with a curved handle and a white plastic bag.

A slim woman with long legs and a long walking stride, wearing her dark shoulder length hair loose. She wears a white hooded jacket with a front zipper closure, an upper hip hem, and a darker inner hood area, paired with dark slim skinny jeans and dark ankle boots. She also carries a large black backpack on her back, with the bag sitting off one shoulder in some positions.

A slightly tall, lanky man with light skin, a slim elongated face, a defined jawline, and short dark brown hair with a receding hairline and pronounced forehead; his hair is side parted with more volume on top and closely trimmed sides. He has a compact lean torso, relatively narrow shoulders, and long slender legs. He wears a black zip front jacket left open over a light gray collared inner layer with a darker shirt underneath, blue jeans, and bright blue athletic shoes with white soles. He carries a black backpack with a dark body and light gray shoulder straps on both shoulders and also holds a bright blue drawstring bag in one hand.

A woman with light skin and a regular build, wearing medium length light brown to medium brown hair loose with a slight outward flip. She wears a red and black jacket with a high collar, a black central torso panel, and red sleeves and side sections, paired with loose gray pants. She carries a black backpack with shoulder straps and a white graphic patch on the back, with a long loose black strap hanging down from it. Her footwear is athletic shoes with dark uppers and white soles.

A man with a regular build and a broad upper body silhouette from layered outerwear wears a dark knit beanie that fully covers his head. He has on a long dark overcoat reaching around the knees, cut in a structured straight shape with a slightly flared lower hem, paired with dark straight leg pants and dark shoes. He carries a large black backpack worn high on both shoulders, with visible shoulder straps on both sides, a rounded top, a broad body, and a small light logo patch near the upper center. The overall outfit is predominantly dark and gives him a solid, slightly bulky upper body outline.

A man of regular build wears a dark long sleeved hooded jacket with the hood up covering most of his head, paired with lighter gray straight leg pants. He carries a black backpack on his back with a small light vertical accent near the upper center, and the hood has a light detail around the opening, creating a dark upper half and lighter gray lower half.

A man with a receding hairline, dark hair tied back, a stocky build, and a broad torso wears a black jacket, black straight leg trousers, and dark shoes, with a light horizontal band around the waist and a black backpack with light shoulder straps on his back.

A light skinned woman with dark brown hair tied back in a low ponytail and a slender slim build wears a dark zip up hooded jacket with the hood resting on her back, dark skinny pants, and light colored sneakers with white soles, carrying a large black backpack with broad shoulder straps and a blue detail at one side.

A slim light skinned man with short dark brown hair, wearing a dark jacket with a clear hem over a lighter gray hooded inner layer, the gray hood sitting outside the dark outerwear around the neck and upper back. He wears blue jeans and dark shoes with lighter midsoles. He carries a large rectangular black backpack with light gray side panels and trim, giving the bag a structured boxy look with distinct panel sections.

A slim man with relatively narrow shoulders wears a dark baseball cap with a large front logo, with dark hair mostly covered by the cap and his face shaded by the brim. He has on a dark hooded zip front jacket with the hood down over a bright green shirt that extends below the jacket hem, creating a strong green band at the waist, along with straight cut blue jeans and dark shoes.

A slim woman with medium to dark skin tone, an oval face, and dark hair near center parted and tied back. She wears loose cream open long sleeve outerwear over a light rounded neck top, with wide sleeves and a dropped shoulder shape, straight light beige pants, and dark flats. She carries a large pink floral patterned tote bag with dark shoulder straps and a light blue rectangular hanging item at her side.

A slim man with a narrow frame and medium skin tone, wearing his hood up so that dark hair shows at the forehead and his face is largely obscured by the hood opening. He wears a bright red hooded jacket with a large hood, a front zipper, and two front hand pockets, and he keeps his hands in the pockets. The jacket has a longline cut that extends below the hips to the upper thigh, giving a layered streetwear look. He also wears skinny light blue to gray jeans, brown ankle boots, and a black backpack carried on his back with a shoulder strap.

A woman with light skin, a regular build, and dark hair tied back wears dark outerwear consisting of a black hooded jacket with a front zip closure and a high collar, with a white inner collar area at the neck. She has black track pants with a wide bright pink side stripe running down the outer leg, white sneakers, and a red and white backpack with dark trim worn on both shoulders.

A young man with light skin, a narrow face, and a slim jawline, wearing short straight dark hair parted to the side. He has a slim build with relatively long legs. He is dressed in a dark zip front jacket over a dark collared shirt, paired with light khaki straight leg trousers and dark shoes. He also wears a black backpack on both shoulders, giving him a clear dark top with light trousers color layout.

A slim woman with light skin and brown hair tied back wears a teal jacket hanging open over a dark top, with light blue jeans and dark shoes with white soles. She carries a large dark shoulder bag on one shoulder with a white rectangular bag tag attached at the side.

A slim woman with light skin, narrow shoulders, and long dark straight hair worn loose and draped forward beneath a dark hood. She wears an olive green parka with a front zipper and flap front pockets over a light colored top with a large white hood panel at the neck and shoulders, paired with light blue skinny jeans, dark sneakers with thick white midsoles and white side detailing, and a black backpack with a prominent white side patch.

A fair skinned man with short light brown hair, cut close on the sides and back, and a slightly receding hairline at the temples with a visible crown. He has an average, regular build with slightly narrow shoulders. He wears a long sleeve collared button up overshirt in a bold plaid pattern, mixing purple, red, pink, and blue square blocks, with a full front button placket and a straight hem that falls below the waist. He pairs it with dark blue jeans in a straight leg cut and dark shoes. He is carrying a white motorcycle helmet with dark stripe detailing.

A light skinned man with a regular build wears a white knit beanie and has a short dark beard concentrated along the jaw and chin with noticeable sideburns. He is dressed in a black long sleeve jacket with a loose straight fit, sleeves to the wrists, and a hem that falls below the waist and covers the hips. He pairs it with medium blue jeans in a straight, narrow leg cut and dark sneakers with white midsoles and white soles. He also carries a white plastic shopping bag in one hand.

A man with short dark hair, medium skin tone, and a regular build wears a dark long sleeve jacket with light blue jeans and dark shoes with light sole edges. A large bright red backpack with black trim and black shoulder straps is especially noticeable.

A man with short dark hair and a regular build wears red hooded outerwear with the red hood down, light khaki straight leg pants, and dark athletic shoes with lighter midsoles. A bright blue garment is draped over his left shoulder and across the upper back, standing out against the red outerwear.

A slim woman with light skin and dark hair tied in a bun wears a bright blue hooded jacket with darker navy sleeves and black straight leg pants. She carries a large rounded backpack that covers most of her back, in light blue and white with dark edging and dark shoulder straps. The backpack has a pale blue center panel and bold symmetrical teal and purple curved graphic panels across the front, with a small pink item attached on the left side. She wears white shoes with white soles.

A fair skinned man with short light brown hair and a regular build wears a dark hooded jacket with the hood down, tan straight leg pants, and dark shoes with light midsoles. He carries a large dark brown backpack with black trim, including a side pocket holding a light colored cylindrical item, and the backpack has a large white graphic patch near the bottom. In his right hand he carries a dark bottle with a red label, reading overall as a red bottle. The combination of the dark hooded jacket, tan pants, distinctive brown backpack with the white lower patch, side pocket cylinder, and bottle in hand makes him easy to pick out.

A slim woman with light skin, narrow shoulders, and long legs, wearing shoulder length brown straight hair loose with a side part tucked behind the ear. She wears a black zip up jacket with a full length front zipper outlined by light colored piping, with a light colored top showing at the neckline. Her hands are kept in the jacket pockets. She also carries a purple backpack with shoulder straps and wears purple slim fit pants, and light gray shoes with light soles.

A woman with medium skin tone, a slightly stocky build, and dark straight shoulder length hair worn down with a near center part. She wears a black hooded zip up jacket closed at the front with a clear front zipper, and a small light colored logo patch on the left chest. Her hands are kept in the jacket side pockets. She also wears blue fitted skinny jeans, tan lace up shoes, and carries a black backpack with dark shoulder straps on both shoulders.

A woman with light skin, a rounded face, and straight medium brown shoulder length hair worn loose with a side part and tucked behind the ears. She has a slim build with a compact upper body, narrow shoulders, and relatively long lean legs, with a slight forward torso inclination and somewhat rounded shoulders. She wears a bright royal blue hooded sweatshirt with a front kangaroo pocket and the hood lying flat on the back, a white shirt hem showing below it, dark blue fitted jeans, and black sneakers with white soles. She carries a large mint green backpack with black trim, black shoulder straps, and large white graphic accents, with a black crossbody strap across the torso.

A slim woman with a narrow frame and long dark hair worn loose wears a dark green hooded jacket and black fitted leggings. She carries a large patterned shoulder tote bag with light beige handles, the bag resting along her side and back, and holds a small light colored item in one hand. Her shoes are bright purple athletic shoes with white soles, which stand out strongly against the otherwise dark outfit.

A light skinned man with glasses, a soft rounded face, and short brown hair with a receding hairline and rounded side volume. He has a regular build and wears a bright blue hooded zip front parka with white drawstrings over a light inner shirt showing at the chest opening. He carries a black backpack, a dark umbrella, and a dark diagonal strap attached to a small dark bag at the hip. He wears dark lower garments with white socks and light colored footwear.

A slim woman with a narrow frame and light skin tone, wearing her long straight light brown to dark blonde hair loose and parted to one side. She wears a loose white long sleeve top with a relaxed fit and slightly dropped shoulders, paired with black slim fit pants. The pants are tucked into black boots with a rounded toe and low heel, reading as mid calf boots in the clearer views. She also carries a dark shoulder bag on one shoulder, with a broad strap and a soft slouchy body.

A woman with a curvy build and dark hair mostly covered by a black knit beanie, wearing a dark waist length black puffer jacket with a fur trimmed hood and a tan fur trimmed collar area around the neckline. She has dark slim pants and white athletic shoes. On her back she carries a medium sized rounded bright pink backpack with large white curved paneling across it, creating a bold white arc design on the back of the bag.

A slim woman with light skin, a slim oval face, and a narrow jawline, wearing long dark brown hair loose with a center to slightly off center part. She has a narrow frame and long legged proportions. She wears a dark coat with a simple straight front that falls to mid thigh, with full length sleeves and the coat left open at the neck. Both hands are kept in the coat’s side pockets. Below, she wears dark blue skinny denim jeans. Her footwear is a pair of light gray ankle boots with rounded toes and a darker sole edge, creating dark upper clothing paired with lighter ankle boots.

A light skinned man with a slim build, short brown hair tied back, and a short beard wears a dark jacket left open at the front over a green top. He has dark slim pants and dark ankle boots with a raised heel. He carries a large light colored backpack on his back, with dark trim and dark shoulder straps; the pack has a bulky rounded shape and stands out as a prominent item.

A slim woman with a narrow frame and light skin tone, wearing medium brown wavy hair tied back low. She wears a light gray long sleeve jacket left open over a light top that reads as pink underneath, paired with dark fitted slim pants. Her footwear is dark ankle boots, with light socks visible above the boots. She carries a large dark backpack on one shoulder; the backpack has a rounded top, an elongated body, and mint green side panels that stand out against the darker trim.

A slim woman with light skin, a slim face, and a narrow jawline, wearing her dark hair mostly under a blue hood with dark hair at the front, side swept bangs across the forehead, and shoulder length to longer dark hair falling below the hood. She wears a bright blue hooded jacket with the hood up, a front zipper, and a lightweight loose fit. A black diagonal crossbody strap runs across her chest and connects to a large brown crossbody messenger bag worn at the hip. She pairs it with dark slim straight leg pants and light colored, white shoes.

A slightly tall man with light skin, short dark hair, broad shoulders, and a regular build. He wears a black puffer jacket with horizontal quilted baffles and a full front zipper, left open over a plain medium gray crew neck shirt. He has khaki straight leg pants and dark athletic shoes with white soles. A dark shoulder bag hangs at his left side, supported by a broad strap running diagonally across his torso from the right shoulder to the left hip, and he also carries a dark duffel bag in one hand.

A man with medium skin tone, a regular build, and short dark hair under a dark baseball cap, walking with both hands kept in his jeans pockets. He wears a black long sleeve track jacket with a bold white curved horizontal stripe across the upper chest and white stripes running down the sleeves, straight leg medium blue jeans, and bright yellow athletic shoes. He also carries a black backpack with shoulder straps on both shoulders.

A slim woman with long dark hair worn loose down her back, wearing a dark loose hooded jacket with the hood resting on the upper back, dark slim pants, and dark shoes. A medium dark blue backpack worn on both shoulders, with light shoulder straps, black side panels, a light gray horizontal zipper pocket across the lower front, and a small light gray curved trim detail near the bottom front is especially noticeable.

A dark skinned man with very short close cropped hair and a regular build, dressed in business formal attire. He wears a dark blazer with lapels left open over a light dress shirt that reads as pale pink to light lavender, with a clear central button placket. At the neck he has a bright blue tie, along with a long white cloth draped around the neck and hanging down the front in two vertical panels. He pairs this with straight leg light khaki trousers and dark shoes.

A dark skinned man with a stocky build, broad torso and hips, and very short close cropped hair wears bright green over ear headphones. He has on a maroon hooded sweatshirt with the hood down, the raised hood resting against his upper back, along with medium blue jeans and dark ankle boots. He carries a royal blue backpack with black trim and black shoulder straps; the backpack has a cinched drawstring top gathered near the upper center, and a dark diagonal crossbody strap runs from his right shoulder across his back.

A slim woman with light skin, long straight dark hair worn loose, and dark sunglasses. She wears a brown patterned jacket with a front zipper, with a dark red top showing at the neckline underneath. Her lower half is blue slim fit jeans and light colored sneakers with white uppers and darker trim. She carries a large tan to orange brown shoulder bag on one shoulder and holds a small white item in one hand.

A light skinned man with a clean angular face and very short light hair cut close on the sides, wearing a dark navy long sleeve crew neck top and blue straight leg jeans. He carries a large camouflage backpack worn high on his back with light tan shoulder straps and a rounded full shape, with a small red item attached at the side. He wears low athletic shoes in a gray brown tone with a slightly tan outsole edge.

A slim woman with long legs has her head and face fully obscured by a large dark umbrella carried overhead. She wears a short dark navy quilted puffer jacket with horizontal baffles over a white underlayer that extends below the jacket in a curved hem, carries a large dark shoulder tote bag on one shoulder and wears dark slim fitted legwear with dark ankle boots. The oversized umbrella, short navy puffer, curved white underlayer hem, large dark tote, and ankle boots are especially distinctive.

A woman with dark hair pulled back into a low ponytail and a regular build, wearing a purple long sleeve top that fits close to the body and is tucked into dark straight leg pants. She carries a medium dark backpack with light colored shoulder straps and blue green patterned panels, giving the bag a multicolor look with light and teal tones. She finishes the outfit with dark shoes.

A light skinned man with short dark hair, a regular build, and slightly broad shoulders wears a bright blue long sleeve top with a raised gathered collar around the neck, dark straight leg pants, and dark shoes. He carries a large blue backpack with gray side sections, a black base and black straps, and a white graphic on the back. A bright yellow cylindrical item is attached along the right side of the backpack, making the bag especially distinctive.

A slim man with light skin, short dark hair, and a relatively narrow shouldered frame wears a dark short sleeve T-shirt layered over bright blue long sleeves. The back of the shirt has a large vertical light colored graphic centered down the middle. He pairs it with dark straight leg pants and dark shoes. He also carries a black crossbody shoulder bag with a broad strap running diagonally across his back, attached to a medium to large rectangular soft bag body that rests at the hip and back.

A slim woman with light skin and long dark brown hair worn down, wearing a black open jacket with lapels in a structured blazer shape over a white top with a deep V neck opening and a large dark abstract graphic across the front. She wears dark blue fitted skinny jeans and bright pink flat shoes, and carries a large burgundy shoulder bag with a dark strap resting at her left hip.

A light skinned man with short dark hair and a regular build, wearing a dark waist length jacket with a raised collar, light blue loose fit jeans, and dark shoes. He carries a large black backpack with broad shoulder straps, and there is a bright green detail attached near the top of the backpack. The backpack reads as full and substantial against his back, and the clothing stays simple and plain with the dark jacket contrasted against the pale blue denim.

A woman with dark shoulder length to medium length hair resting around the neck and a regular build wears dark hooded outerwear, a dark hooded jacket, with fitted blue jeans and dark ankle boots. She carries a large burgundy backpack that stands out strongly, with black side panels, dark shoulder straps, a small light patch near the lower center, and a yellow item attached at the side. The backpack also shows a prominent light branching graphic running down the center area.

A woman with light skin, a regular build, and long dark brown hair worn loose past the shoulders with a side part, draped over one shoulder. She wears a black coat with an open front and high neckline, a dark red neck layer, slim fit blue jeans, dark ankle boots, and a black backpack worn on both shoulders with the straps visible.

A slim woman with a medium dark skin tone and dark shoulder length hair worn loose, carrying a large black backpack with both shoulder straps on. She wears a black hooded zip front jacket, with the zipper centered at the front, left open over a white top that shows clearly at the front and side. She pairs it with dark slim pants and dark athletic shoes with light colored, white soles.

A slim man with short dark hair and a downward angled head wears a light gray short sleeve polo shirt with a dark collar under a light hooded zip up jacket with dark sleeves, along with dark pants, a black backpack with dark shoulder straps, and red athletic shoes.

A slim woman with dark hair tied back below a dark baseball cap, wearing an olive green hooded jacket over a plain long sleeve top with a loose straight hem. She has black fitted legwear with a bold continuous white stripe down the outer side of each leg, white socks above dark athletic shoes with white soles, and a large rounded black backpack worn on both shoulders.

A slightly tall, slim man with long legs, light skin, short dark hair, dark sunglasses, and a dark full beard. He wears a light tan casual jacket left open over a light blue button up shirt with a central placket, the shirt tucked into dark straight leg slim pants with a dark belt at the waist. He also has a light tan crossbody shoulder bag with a dark strap and carries a yellow bag. His footwear is tan shoes with white soles.

A slim woman with long legs and long straight brown hair worn loose down her back wears a sleeveless light beige top with a low open back and thin dark shoulder straps, dark green fitted skinny pants, and white shoes, and carries a large black backpack on one shoulder with metal hardware details.

A man with very short close cropped dark hair and a medium to light skin tone, with a regular build and slightly broad shoulders. His thick outerwear gives him a bulkier upper body silhouette. He wears a dark gray hooded puffer jacket with a high padded collar and a bulky hood resting across the upper back, paired with dark straight leg pants and white soled sneakers. He carries a large dark backpack on both shoulders; the backpack has a broad rounded body, a wide top flap, and a lighter horizontal panel near the top. Overall, he has a dark clothing palette with the white shoe soles standing out.

A dark skinned woman with dark short hair gathered into a small bun, a compact close cropped hairstyle, and a curvy lower body with fuller hips and thighs. She wears a plain dark navy jacket, gray fitted pants, and black knee high boots that rise to around the knees and have a slight heel. On her back is a large black backpack with a rounded top and bulky main compartment, marked by a light colored logo on the rear panel, with one shoulder strap hanging loose in a dangling strap detail at the side.

A light skinned man with an oval face, narrow jawline, high forehead, receding hairline, short dark hair, and sunglasses wears a gray pullover hoodie with a blue inner hood, a blue shirt collar at the neckline, a front kangaroo pocket, and a large light colored chest graphic. He carries a black backpack with two shoulder straps and wears loose blue purple plaid pants with bold white vertical stripes and dark athletic shoes with bright green accents.

A light skinned man with short dark brown hair, a rounded head shape, and a slightly full lower face and jaw area. He has a regular build and tends to carry himself with a slight forward, head down posture. He wears a medium gray hooded sweatshirt as a gray long sleeve top, paired with loose blue gray to dark blue pants. He carries a black rounded backpack with shoulder straps, marked by a large bright orange red rectangular panel attached vertically at the center of the backpack back, along with a small light colored detail near the lower part of the bag. His shoes are light colored to dark, overall muted in tone.

A slim light skinned woman with long dark hair worn loose carries a black backpack and wears a dark hooded jacket with a front zipper, two flap chest pockets, and a large white neck covering, layered over a light top with the hem extending below the jacket, along with dark blue skinny jeans and dark ankle boots.

A casually dressed man with light skin, short dark hair and visible sideburns under a light beige baseball cap with a darker brim and a dark adjustable back strap. He is slightly tall with a regular but solid build, moderately broad level shoulders, a straight somewhat long torso, and long slim legs. His usual posture and gait are relaxed, with both hands kept in the pockets of a dark lightweight hooded jacket that has a loose straight fit, a raised collar, an attached hood lying flat across the upper back and shoulders, and a zip front worn closed. A lighter blue collared shirt shows clearly at the neck opening. He wears straight cut medium blue jeans and dark brown shoes.

A light skinned man with short dark brown hair cut close on the sides and back, a rounded oval face, and a moderately full jaw and neck area. He has broad shoulders, a broad torso, and a stocky to heavyset build, with a slightly broad walking stance. He wears a dark navy pullover sweater over a light blue collared shirt, with the light blue shirt collar clearly showing above the neckline. The outfit has a strong dark top and light pants contrast. His trousers are light khaki and straight leg with side pockets, and he keeps his hands in those trouser pockets. The sweater has a small light emblem centered high on the upper back near the collar, and he wears dark shoes.

A tall slim man with long legs, light skin, and short light brown hair. He wears a dark waist length jacket with a simple plain long sleeve structure over a black long sleeve top, paired with light gray straight leg pants and dark sneakers with white soles. A large bright orange backpack with yellow shoulder straps, featuring a vertical light colored center detail on the back panel is especially noticeable. The backpack appears full and rounded, adding a strong bright color block against the otherwise dark jacket and pale pants.

A slim woman with her hood up, the hood covering her hair and largely obscuring her face, wears a bright purple hooded outerwear. She has a narrow, slim frame and dark slim pants. Across her torso she wears a large dark brown crossbody shoulder bag with a wide strap, resting at the hip in a medium rectangular satchel shape with a flap closure. She also carries a bright red item in one hand. Her footwear is dark, with light colored soles.

A woman with medium to dark skin tone and long dark hair worn loose past the shoulders, with a slim curvy frame, a narrow shoulder line, and relatively long slender legs. She wears a fitted burgundy red long sleeve top, dark blue skinny jeans, and flat open tan sandals. A large black backpack covers much of her back; it has multiple compartments and a front zip pocket, giving the bag a bulky structured shape.

A slim woman with short dark brown hair cut close to the head in a rounded short hairstyle wears a black long sleeve top, blue skinny jeans, and brown ankle boots. The backpack has black shoulder straps, a black top carry handle, a rounded top, and a large front zip compartment, with the front also showing gathered panel sections. The overall combination of close cropped dark hair, fitted jeans, brown boots, and the large bright backpack is the part that stands out of her appearance.

A light skinned man with a balding crown and short dark hair around the sides and back, broad shoulders, and a stocky build. He wears a dark gray long sleeve sweatshirt with a plain crew neck and a relaxed drape extending below the waist, paired with dark blue straight leg jeans. He carries a medium black backpack on both shoulders with a rounded oval shape, gray trim outlining the front, broad shoulder straps, and two light rectangular patches near the top.

A woman with a medium light skin tone and regular build, wearing a purple hijab headscarf that covers the hair and neck. She has a modest layered outfit in purple and tan, with a tan long tunic style outerwear that is fitted at the waist and flares out at the hem, over a long sleeve purple top. She wears black pants and dark mid calf boots. On her back is a dark backpack with shoulder straps, decorated with a purple and pink floral pattern.

A man with a medium dark skin tone, sideburns, and long dark hair tied back in a low ponytail, wearing a black knit beanie. He has a slim to regular build with a slightly broad upper body. He wears a dark black leather jacket with a smooth finish and a straight hem, layered over an untucked blue shirt that shows at the neck and hangs below the jacket. His pants are loose medium wash blue jeans with a straight, narrow leg silhouette, paired with dark shoes. He also carries a white plastic shopping bag with bold red print in one hand.

A tall, slim man with light skin, relatively narrow shoulders, a lean straight frame, and long legs. He has short dark hair parted to the side, a prominent nose, and a full dark beard concentrated along the jaw and chin, with full sideburns connected into the beard. He is dressed in business formal clothing: a dark tailored blazer with notch lapels and a two button front over a light blue collared dress shirt left open at the collar without a tie, paired with dark trousers and dark leather dress shoes. He carries a brown leather briefcase with a top handle, flap, and buckles, and also has a dark coat draped over one arm along with a white tote bag.

A woman with medium to dark skin tone and dark shoulder length hair worn down, with a slim build, narrow shoulders, a small upper body frame, and straight slim legs. She wears a dark waist length hooded jacket with a bulky hood at the back of the neck, black skinny straight leg pants, and dark ankle boots, and carries a large white shoulder tote with bold black horizontal stripes.

A slim man in a white baseball cap with his face largely obscured wears a black hooded jacket and a bright blue garment draped across his neck and shoulders. He carries a large gray backpack with black trim, a bold white graphic pattern across the back panel, and several dangling strap details along the sides and lower edge. He also carries a clear bottle in his right hand. His pants are gray straight leg pants with a thin light colored stripe running down the outer leg, and he wears dark shoes.

A slim man with light skin and short dark hair, the hair rounded and slightly fuller at the back, wears a dark varsity jacket with white long sleeves and distinct dark oval elbow patches, layered over a light long sleeve top with a red collar area layer showing at the neck. He has khaki pants with a straight slim leg cut, light socks showing above the shoes, and red athletic sneakers with white midsoles and soles. He carries a large black backpack on both shoulders; the pack has a rounded top, multiple zip compartments, and a small light colored logo patch near the upper area.

A tall, light skinned man with a slim, narrow frame and regular build, short dark hair, and a slightly receding hairline. He wears a very dark formal business outfit that reads as a two piece suit, with a dark suit jacket left open at the front and a light collared shirt showing clearly at the neck opening and above the jacket neckline. The trousers match the jacket, are dark and straight leg, and he wears dark shoes. His hands are kept in his jacket pockets, and he also has a face covering and a carried item on his person.

A man with a rounded face, a soft jawline, and short dark hair under a dark knit beanie. He has a regular compact build with a moderately full torso, a slightly rounded shoulder line, and relatively slimmer legs. He wears a dark zip up jacket with a raised collar, side pockets, and a straight hem, paired with light brown straight leg pants. He carries a dark backpack with shoulder straps and wears dark sneakers with thick white soles.

A light skinned woman with an oval face, medium brown hair pulled back into a ponytail, and dark rectangular eyeglasses. She has a curvy build with slightly wide hips and wears a light gray hooded sweatshirt with drawstrings and a front kangaroo pocket, layered over a dark inner top that shows at the neckline. She pairs it with dark blue skinny jeans and bright pink red mid calf boots with a soft bulky shape. A large dark shoulder bag hangs from one shoulder, with a wide strap crossing the upper torso.

A woman with light skin, a regular build, dark hair pulled back, and dark framed glasses wears a black quilted puffer vest with horizontal baffles and a high padded stand collar over a dark hooded long sleeve top. She carries a light gray backpack on both shoulders, keeps her hands in the pockets and wears blue skinny jeans with black ankle boots and light socks showing above the boots.

A slim woman with long dark brown hair worn loose past the shoulders, carrying a large black backpack on her back. She wears a dark long sleeve top with a smooth plain surface, black cropped leggings ending below the knees, and bright neon green athletic shoes. The backpack is bulky and prominent against her back, and the outfit is mostly dark apart from the vivid shoes.

A slim woman cyclist with light skin, a lightweight narrow frame, relatively narrow shoulders, and long lean limbs with legs that look long relative to her torso. She wears a white bicycle helmet over dark hair tucked into a low ponytail, and her face is largely covered by the helmet. Her posture is forward leaning in a riding position with both arms bent and extended forward. She wears a fitted dark red long sleeve top with darker side panels, black athletic pants with bold white side stripes, and white athletic shoes with light blue and red accents. She carries a rounded black backpack with black shoulder straps and a large red back panel.
